COMPLAINT FILED:12/2/93 #5 JDG DIANE WICK. CSR MARCIA HOLMES. CLERK M SANCHEZ. 3:12PM C/C FOR SETTL CONF. PLFT PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, EDWARD A NAGY. DEFTS PRESENT IN PRO PER. NEGOTIATED DISPO READ INTO RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST DEFTS. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORENCE, DAVID FLORENCE, MARGARET (DIDYA) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 301 PARNASSUS AVE, APT. # 301, SF, CA 94117 $1,350.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,350.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-31-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
